description_long: This object is a modern shotgun with a cylindrical, metallic body and a ribbed, elongated fore-end grip. The main tube is dark gray or black, with metallic accents and a few small colored details, such as a red button or switch near the trigger area. The shotgun features a prominent barrel with a smooth, slightly reflective finish, and a side-mounted component that may serve as a mounting rail or housing for controls. The rear section is ribbed for grip, and the overall design is streamlined, lacking a traditional full stock. The trigger guard is compact and rounded, closely integrated with the body. The object appears robust and utilitarian, suitable for urban tactical or law enforcement scenarios.
description: A sleek, modern shotgun with a ribbed fore-end, metallic body, and compact trigger guard, lacking a traditional stock. It features a dark finish with metallic and colored accent details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular barrel opening, red button, and compact trigger guard.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the elongated ribbed grip, metallic body, and side-mounted component.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the ribbed grip and the alignment of the barrel and body.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, mirroring view 1 but with clearer visibility of the trigger guard and side details.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, cylindrical with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: compact, rounded trigger guard closely integrated with the body, no finger grooves or reinforcement visible
